description: Tier 1 — the cycle + chokepoint baseline only (specify..release proofs, ordered-task enforcement, task-completion, hygiene). The opinionated Heurex structural gates (Sentrux, ArchUnitNET) are skipped, so doti installs as a pure spec-driven workflow into an existing repo without imposing the Heurex structure. This is the non-imposing default when no tier is declared.
